2604.15082.title: Autonomous Evolution of EDA Tools: Multi-Agent Self-Evolved ABC
2604.15082.paper_summary: This paper introduces the first \emph{self-evolving} logic synthesis framework, which leverages Large Language Model (LLM) agents to autonomously improve the source code of \textsc{ABC}, the widely adopted logic synthesis system. Our framework operates on the \emph{entire integrated ABC codebase}, and the output repository preserves its single-binary execution model and command interface. In the initial evolution cycle, we bootstrap the system using existing prior open-source synthesis components, covering flow tuning, logic minimization, and technology mapping, but without manually injecting new heuristics. On top of this foundation, a team of LLM-based agents iteratively rewrites and evolves specific sub-components of ABC following our ``programming guidance`` prompts under a unified correctness and QoR-driven evaluation loop. Each evolution cycle proposes code modifications, compiles the integrated binary, validates correctness, and evaluates quality-of-results (QoR) on \emph{multi-suite benchmarks including ISCAS~85/89/99, VTR, EPFL, and IWLS~2005}. Through continuous feedback, the system discovers optimizations beyond human-designed heuristics, effectively \emph{learning new synthesis strategies} that enhance QoR. We detail the architecture of this self-improving system, its integration with \textsc{ABC}, and results demonstrating that the framework can autonomously and progressively improve EDA tool at full million-line scale.
2604.15082.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了第一個 \emph{自我演化} 的邏輯綜合框架，該框架利用大型語言模型（LLM）代理自動改善 \textsc{ABC} 的源代碼，這是一個廣泛應用的邏輯綜合系統。<lb/>我們的框架運作於 \emph{整個集成的 ABC 代碼庫}，並且輸出庫保持其單一二進制執行模型和命令介面。<lb/>在初始的演化循環中，我們使用現有的開源綜合組件啟動系統，涵蓋流程調整、邏輯最小化和技術映射，但不手動注入新的啟發式方法。<lb/>在這個基礎上，一組基於 LLM 的代理根據我們的「編程指導」提示，在統一的正確性和 QoR 驅動的評估循環下，迭代地重寫和演化 ABC 的特定子組件。<lb/>每個演化循環提出代碼修改，編譯集成的二進制文件，驗證正確性，並在 \emph{包括 ISCAS~85/89/99、VTR、EPFL 和 IWLS~2005 的多套基準上評估結果質量（QoR）}。<lb/>通過持續的反饋，系統發現超越人類設計的啟發式方法的優化，有效地 \emph{學習新的綜合策略}，以提升 QoR。<lb/>我們詳細描述了這個自我改善系統的架構、它與 \textsc{ABC} 的整合，以及結果顯示該框架能夠在全百萬行規模下自主且逐步改善 EDA 工具。
2604.15082.author: Cunxi Yu et.al.
